channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tagging, 8th April
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gentlemans Row, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Bollards have been damaged and not replaced, 8th April
item.description:
The bollards on this part of Heversham road have been damaged and not replaced, the junction at Woolwich rd is very busy with cars turning into Heversham rd and with parked cars along one side it vehicles are mounting and driving along the pavement at speed to exit out of Heversham rd. I am partially sighted and have mobility problems I am also a carer for my husband, and the vehicles behaving this way makes me feel very vulnerable and concerned for my own and other people’s safety. Is there a reason these have not been replaced? if so what are you going to do to stop people getting injured or killed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Heversham Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 8th April
item.description:
More fly tipping on our doorstep. How can we collectively stop this happening every week?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Colvestone Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and rubbish building up, 8th April
item.description:
Good afternoon, this litter bin and surrounding area is usually cleared daily but the rubbish has not been picked up for at least 3 days now. It is concerning because it is attracting pests in front of flats and food shops. There are no communal collection bins so all the residents and shops alike put their waste there. Please collect the rubbish as it is getting out of control.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and rubbish building up, 8th April
item.description:
Good afternoon, this litter bin and surrounding area is usually cleared daily but the rubbish has not been picked up for at least 3 days now. It is concerning because it is attracting pests in front of flats and food shops. There are no communal collection bins so all the residents and shops alike put their waste there. Please collect the rubbish as it is getting out of control.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Tesco there’s multiple balloons stuck on the trees for months, 8th April
item.description:
Environmental issue in Walworth Road SE17 1RL, near Tesco and Specsavers . There have been multiple red balloons stuck on the trees for months. These balloons are not only unsightly but may also pose a risk to wildlife and the environment as they degrade.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Since Friday - more rubbish being added, 8th April
item.description:
This is disgusting. Since Friday more and more rubbish is being piled on. Looks like council litter bins too. It’s attracting numerous foxes who then pull it apart and then rubbish is strewn across the street. This has been going on for over 5 years…

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned in private carpark level 2, 8th April
item.description:
The owner had a collision in the carpark and after several attempts to contact for removal the owner has not made contact.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glades Place, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes and disintegration, 8th April
item.description:
This whole stretch of road, notably on the left has a long pothole that means cars have other swerve to the middle of the road, with on coming traffic coming down the hill round the corner. Very unsafe and needs urgent attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Champion Park, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven, disintegrated road, 8th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
